case_title: SUDHIVARAKOM, PAU VS BENNETT, PATRICIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUDHIVARAKOM, PAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, PATRICIA MALLET, FRANCIS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,576.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BENNETT, PATRICIA MALLET, FRANCIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SUDHIVARAKOM, PAU PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SUDHIVARAKOM, PAU AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, PATRICIA MALLET, FRANCIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
